testcase.name: runScenario["Add item to cart", "Functional Test"](1)
testcase.system-out: @testIDX-add-to-cart Scenario Outline: Add item to cart &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/testIDX.feature:43&amp#27;[0m URL: https://sauce-demo.myshopify.com/ &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser opens Chrome browser and navigate to url &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"https://sauce-demo.myshopify.com/"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.SDTesting.open_chrome_and_go_to_url(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m DELAY: Waiting for 3 seconds... DELAY: Waiting for 3 seconds... &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser choose product &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Grey jacket"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and add to cart&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.SDIdxTest.user_choose_product_and_add_to_cart(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m SUCCESS: Press button with label: 'Check Out' DELAY: Waiting for 3 seconds... SUCCESS: Text contains: 'Grey jacket' Value: 1 getQty: 1 getTotal: 55.00 gTotal: 55 actualTotal: 55.00 DELAY: Waiting for 3 seconds... &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser go to cart page, verify product &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Grey jacket"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m exist and qty &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"1"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and total &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"55"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and checkout item&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.SDIdxTest.user_go_to_cart_page_and_checkout_item(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m DELAY: Waiting for 5 seconds... SUCCESS: Input 'tetexe422@inboxbear.com' into field with placeholder 'Email' SUCCESS: Input 'John' into field with placeholder 'First name (optional)' SUCCESS: Input 'Doe' into field with placeholder 'Last name' SUCCESS: Input 'Test Inc' into field with placeholder 'Company (optional)' SUCCESS: Input '123 Test St' into field with placeholder 'Address' SUCCESS: Input 'Test City' into field with placeholder 'City' SUCCESS: Selected 'West Java' SUCCESS: Input '12345' into field with placeholder 'Postal code' SUCCESS: Input '0821-1054-5855' into field with placeholder 'Phone (optional)' DELAY: Waiting for 5 seconds... Input Card Details SUCCESS: Input '5552 0000 8888 8080' into field with placeholder 'Card number' Input Card Number SUCCESS: Input slowly '1327' DELAY: Waiting for 1 seconds... SUCCESS: Input '123' into field with placeholder 'Security code' DELAY: Waiting for 1 seconds... DELAY: Waiting for 3 seconds... &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser verify on payment page and fill email &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"tetexe422@inboxbear.com"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and first name &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"John"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and last name &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Doe"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and company &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Test Inc"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and address &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"123 Test St"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and city &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Test City"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and province &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"West Java"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and postal code &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"12345"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and phone &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"0821-1054-5855"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and card number &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"5552 0000 8888 8080"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and expiry month and year &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"1327"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and cvv &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"123"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and name on card &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"<firstname>"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and click pay now&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.SDIdxTest.user_verify_on_payment_page_and_fill_payment_details(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser close browser&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.SDTesting.user_close_browser()&amp#27;[0m
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". Mar 18, 2026 1:23:12 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 18, 2026 1:23:12 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.80. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
